runs.notes: First run under the new reporting spec. Bootstrapped data/ storage layer (did not previously exist in repo). Backfilled site totals, device split, and channel split for 2026-07-06 through 2026-07-14 from the GA4 Funnel Digital & Adnoc exploration via manual date-range queries (no GA4 API/connector available in this environment). Per-day Overall Funnel and Adnoc Funnel step data was collected directly for 2026-07-13 and 2026-07-14, and as an aggregate (not per-day) for This Week So Far (2026-07-13 to 2026-07-14) and Last Week (2026-07-06 to 2026-07-12). Per-day funnel step breakdowns for 2026-07-06 through 2026-07-12 individually were NOT collected (would require 7 additional GA4 exploration queries) and are stored as null in those daily files rather than estimated or interpolated, per the no-estimation rule.
missing_data: new_users (site) - metric not collected this run for any date
engaged_sessions / engagement_rate (site) - metric not collected this run for any date
per-day Overall Funnel and Adnoc Funnel step counts for 2026-07-06 through 2026-07-12 (only the 7-day aggregate for Last Week is available)
